creator: lists.dan@gmail.com
text:
It died many times in the ipf_frag_known function.  I removed 'keep frags' from my ipfilter rules and it has not crashed in 7 days, which is a record since installing FreeBSD 10.  I am going to let it run a few more days and then put the 'keep frags' back to see if it crashes.

How does the aio.ko module fit in?
